title: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING

figures_detected.description: Two diagrams showing towing hook locations on the Super S model: upper diagram shows front towing hook with cover behind front bumper, lower diagram shows rear towing hook location.

content_blocks.text: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING
Always pull the cable straight out from the vehicle. Never pull on the hook at a sideways angle.

content_blocks.description: Towing hook locations on Super S model vehicle — front towing hook behind cover, and rear towing hook.

callouts.label: Cover
callouts.position: front bumper cover over towing hook

model_notes: Super S model shown in figure UGI010
